system.description:
### Tier 3 Exploration / Mental An abstract digital landscape within the geth collective consciousness. Reality is made up of cascading green and black data, where thoughts take physical form. Impulses: Rewrite the code, glitch the system, merge with the collective.

#### Features Virtual Physics - Passive: Physicality is an illusion here. PCs must use Knowledge instead of Strength and Instinct instead of Agility for all movement, defense, and melee attack rolls.

How does your digital avatar differ from your physical body? Does your weapon look like code or a shimmering light?

Hacking Reality - Action: A PC may attempt to rewrite the environment. On a successful Knowledge Roll (17), they can create a temporary bridge, delete a piece of cover an enemy is using, or grant an ally Advantage on their next roll.

What lines of code do you visualize to bridge the digital chasm?

Firewall Detection - Reaction: When a PC rolls with Fear, the system identifies them as a virus. Spend a Fear to spawn a "Security Spike." The target must make a Knowledge Reaction Roll (17) or take 2d10+5 tech damage as the server attempts to purge their consciousness.

Do you feel the heat of the server's processing power as it tries to delete you? }}

{{environment,
